PORTFOLIO_PAGE.TITLE: Portfolio — Our work
PORTFOLIO_PAGE.HERO_SUBTITLE: A selection of projects that speak for themselves.

ABOUT_PAGE.TITLE: About us — Obliq Productions
ABOUT_PAGE.HERO_SUBTITLE: We are an audiovisual production company in Valencia with a passion for storytelling.
ABOUT_PAGE.STORY_TEXT: Obliq Productions was born from a passion for audiovisual media and the desire to create content that connects with people. Formed by a versatile and experienced team, we understand the nature of each project and effectively adapt to its needs. From our base in Valencia, we work with national and international brands to produce content that makes a difference.
ABOUT_PAGE.VALUE_1_TEXT: Every project is an opportunity to innovate. We seek creative solutions that surprise and excite.
ABOUT_PAGE.VALUE_2_TEXT: We use state-of-the-art equipment and optimized workflows to guarantee the highest quality.
ABOUT_PAGE.VALUE_3_TEXT: We commit to every project as if it were our own. Your success is our success.

CONTACT_PAGE.TITLE: Contact — Obliq Productions
